title: Making the Most of a Campus Visit: The 5Ws for Counsellors
excerpt: Key takeaways from an IACAC webinar on campus visits — a practical 5W framework covering preparation, observation, note-taking, and follow-through for school counsellors.

title: UCAS Personal Statements: What University Admissions Truly Want
excerpt: Key takeaways from a Unifrog webinar on UCAS personal statements — what UK university admissions teams truly want, common pitfalls to avoid, and the Sutton Trust research that shows why counsellor support matters.

title: Relevance of AI in Current Industry Dynamics: 5 Takeaways for Counsellors
excerpt: Five key takeaways from the Salesforce Great Asia AI Summit and an HBR Ideacast podcast — grounding counsellors in the real-world AI conversation so they can answer students' hardest questions about computer science and data science.

title: Psychometric Tests: What Students and Counsellors Need to Know
excerpt: Key takeaways from a Unifrog webinar on psychometric testing — helping counsellors prepare students for the assessments used by companies like Nestlé and Rolls-Royce, and the direct link to Unifrog's self-assessment tools.

title: Econometrics & Career Pathways: A Guide for High School Career Counsellors
excerpt: A practical guide for career counsellors on surfacing econometrics and data career pathways early — linking subject choices to global job roles, earning potential, and free tools students can start using today.

title: Econometrics in the Classroom: Key Insights for Economics & Mathematics Teachers
excerpt: Key takeaways from a FutureWise webinar on econometrics — helping Economics and Mathematics teachers connect classroom theory to real-world data careers through correlation, regression, and the power of Y = MX + B.

title: You Are Your Only Competition
excerpt: The most successful people aren't trying to beat others — they compete only with who they were yesterday. Here's why self-competition is the most powerful mindset shift you can make.

title: Getting Started with Cambridge Curriculum
excerpt: An introduction to the Cambridge International curriculum framework, its core principles, and how it transforms student learning outcomes in international schools.

title: Artificial Intelligence in Education: What Teachers Need to Know
excerpt: A practical guide for educators on how AI tools are reshaping classrooms, and how to harness them responsibly for better learning outcomes.

title: 10 Career Counselling Tips Every High School Student Should Know
excerpt: From building a strong academic profile to choosing the right university pathway, these ten tips will help high school students navigate their future with confidence.

title: Scrolling Vs Studying: A Short Guide to Dopamine Detox
excerpt: Why does studying feel like climbing Everest while scrolling feels effortless? The answer lies in dopamine — and here's a practical detox plan to reset your brain's reward system.

title: Your Digital Stuff is a Mess? Let's Fix It!
excerpt: Folders everywhere, missing files, inbox overflowing — your digital life is a mess and it's costing you time and peace of mind. Here's a simple, actionable plan to organise it once and for all.
